_comment: Example X-intel config. Copy to ~/.ohwow/workspaces/<workspace>/x-config.json and edit. The private copy is gitignored. The public example has generic placeholders only.
workspace_description: What this workspace is building. Used to prime the classifier so it knows what 'relevant' means for us.

brand_voice.tone: warm, direct, builder-to-builder; no marketing speak; no hashtags

buckets.label: AI advancements
buckets.description: Novel research, model releases, new capabilities, benchmarks. What moved the state of the art this week.

buckets.label: Tricks & hacks
buckets.description: Tactical engineering tricks builders are sharing. Prompt patterns, tool-use patterns, integration recipes, unexpected uses.

buckets.label: Competitor moves
buckets.description: What direct or adjacent competitors are shipping, announcing, or complaining about.

buckets.label: Inspiration
buckets.description: Design, taste, product craft. Threads that make us want to build.
